rationale: Prove uniqueness of the insertion position into a strictly sorted sequence (k absent) as a forall lemma over the pre-state, triggered on `pre_self_@.insert(p1, k)` / `pre_self_@.insert(p2, k)`. The lemma is unconditionally true and, in the ensures-proof context, fires with p1=r1, p2=r2 — yielding r1==r2 and hence post1_self_@==post2_self_@ by Seq congruence.
